behavior: dev_node role exists (defaults/tasks/templates/handlers) and is wired into provision-ace2.yml
verification: test -f infra/ansible/roles/dev_node/tasks/main.yml && test -f infra/ansible/roles/dev_node/defaults/main.yml && test -d infra/ansible/roles/dev_node/templates && test -f infra/ansible/roles/dev_node/handlers/main.yml && grep -q 'roles/dev_node' infra/ansible/playbooks/provision-ace2.yml
evidence: 2026-07-10: static criterion, controller-agnostic. Verification command exits 0 — all four role files present under infra/ansible/roles/dev_node/ and provision-ace2.yml wires `- role: ../roles/dev_node`.

behavior: make provision NODE=ace2 ENV=staging is idempotent (second run 0 changed) and coexists with the running Ollama service
verification: make provision NODE=ace2 ENV=staging --tags dev_node | tee /tmp/p1 && make provision NODE=ace2 ENV=staging --tags dev_node | tee /tmp/p2 && grep -qE 'changed=0 .*failed=0' /tmp/p2

behavior: After provisioning: tmux-resurrect, neovim, gh, and dotfiles are present for the interactive user
verification: ssh ace2 'command -v nvim && command -v gh && test -d ~/.tmux/plugins/tmux-resurrect && test -d ~/Projects/Workspace/dotfiles'

behavior: mise is installed; the global config pins node/go/python; they resolve in a fresh non-login shell
verification: ssh ace2 'bash -lc "mise list" && bash -c "node --version && go version && python --version"'

behavior: ~/bin/dev-session.sh launches named tmux sessions (editor + one per agent workspace)
verification: ssh ace2 '~/bin/dev-session.sh && tmux has-session -t editor && tmux has-session -t claude'

behavior: Workspace skeleton exists; per-agent isolated dirs are present
D6 housekeeping timers are split to a tracked follow-up (ANSIBLE-030) rather than dropped
evidence: 2026-07-10: static criterion, controller-agnostic. gh issue #858 open, title 'ANSIBLE-030: dev_node D6 housekeeping systemd timers (split from ANSIBLE-028)' — verification command exits 0.

behavior: Ollama still runs on ace2 after provisioning (additive PR, no removal)
verification: ssh ace2 'docker ps --filter name=ollama --format {{.Status}} | grep -qi up'
